title: Management Communication
description: Have you ever presented an idea to a group but left them only with confusions? Have you ever planned to send negative messages to your friend but didn't know where to start?Have you ever organized a meeting but ended up only with chaos and arguments?………In our course — Management Communication, you will find solutions to these problems. You will learn 3 keywords, 5 communication strategies and how to apply communication skills to solve practical management problems.
